.
.
.

.
.
.
.
.
.
.
Friends from work tax
My favorite werewolf guy
You so handsome buddy
the goofiness can not be contained
sillies
I think they all share one brain hahahaha
Pretty girl
The best boy
Shy girl MV Edit: I love all of you weirdos <3
item.dc:creator: fortytwoembers

item.title: "Does anyone actually use these?" YES!!! The Pose vs The Piece
item.description:
Hey all, I'm AdorkaStock, and I post one free pose daily here on Imgur artists can use to make artworks out of! I've been making pose reference material for years (close to 20 actually). From time to time, I get the comment, "does anyone actually use these?" and every time this crops up I point to the plethora of artists that have made something great with my pose references! It's been a while since I've made a post with some, so I decided to ask Bluesky to share their poses + the pieces. I'm not sharing all of them here as Bluesky's cropping is weird on some of the side-by-side pictures, but you can browse ALL of the quote reposts with art here: https://bsky.app/profile/adorkastock.com/post/3lkvmslpqbc2z/quotes
So I think you'll find the short answer is... Yep. These help artists! And you can help artists too by supporting on Patreon - tiers are as little as $1 a month, and you can pay for a full year up front for $12 if you want. https://www.patreon.com/adorkastock All of my models get paid (including me <3). The more patrons support, the more awesome reference materials I can make by hiring more diverse models, buying more props, upgrading studio materials, and lots more! Know an artist? You can even gift a subscription now! https://www.patreon.com/adorkastock/gift Can't swing it? No sweat. ;) Enjoy my free resources and remember that every share and mention helps. <3 Thank you so much! I hope you enjoyed the art today. I'll be back tomorrow with a new pose!
item.dc:creator: adorkastock

item.title: What Happened Today #52
item.description: Lines Are Being Crossed. Then Redrawn. Again. From Greenland to Venezuela to the South Lawn, the Trump admin is setting fire to norms—and everyone else is racing to catch up. Deportations without due process. Tariffs shifting by the hour. A top law firm buckled under pressure. Even Canada and Denmark are bracing for impact. But beneath the chaos, resistance is building. Indivisible just broke its own growth record by adding more than 100 new groups in one week. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.theguardian.com/world/2025/mar/24/greenland-usha-vance-mike-waltz-visit-anger 2. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/23/canada-carney-snap-election-trump-00244196 3. https://apnews.com/article/trump-south-africa-expelled-ambassador-rasool-d30d1bf06a07bff595357fe80fd8c8ab 4. https://www.cnn.com/2025/03/24/americas/venezuela-us-deportees-flight-latam-intl-hnk/index.html 5. https://www.newsweek.com/trump-border-czar-tom-homan-confronted-deportees-without-gang-ties-2049322 6. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/23/nyregion/mahmoud-khalil-trump-allegations.html 7. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c5yx7k2znq8o 8. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/congress/sen-john-curtis-politicians-not-honest-wont-touch-social-security-rcna197659 9. https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5210052-white-house-seeks-corporate-sponsorships-for-easter-egg-roll-report/ 10. https://davidlat.substack.com/p/brad-karp-firmwide-email-to-paul-weiss-about-the-trump-administration-deal 11. https://www.wsj.com/politics/policy/trump-tariff-reciprocal-deadline-industrial-delay-97508838 12. https://substack.com/home/post/p-159348219

item.title: Um... Hey Imgur, I think temu is trying to sell me Nazi flags on your app...
item.description: I don't know WHAT the algorithm has picked up and it's clearly AI generated - but I'm not sure what else it could be aside from a Swastika emblazoned flag. - Edit: turns out it's not a swastika but a Russian orthodox symbol (see the comments) but DEFINITELY linked to a Russian nationalist-fundamentalist organization. Imgur, you got any thoughts about Temu peddling fascist flags through your ads? Any boost to the post would be appreciated, I feel like someone higher up should see this. - FP EDIT: TY for the eyes on. Hopefully someone of note see's what's being advertised on their site. Bit of a red flag (badumtish)
item.dc:creator: FrasWhar

item.title: Day # whatever of me trying to change people’s minds about spiders
item.description: I wish I had more to say about this Phidippus johnsoni. I wish I had it in me to be personable and educational like I normally am. But my grandmother —the most important woman in my life— just died and I am broken. I’m only posting because it’s part of my routine and I need some semblance of normalcy

item.dc:creator: duffieldious018

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1309 (sconehenge)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: (none, buried deep in food bowl) ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: I am just so sad
item.description: I am grateful for all the love and years of friendship. I thought we would grow old together, our kids would become best friends, and eventually, when we are old and gray, we would end up in the same nursing home, and reek havoc together. We were planning a girls trip to Ireland. We were planning her 40th birthday party. We had so much that we were looking forward to celebrating, but just like that, she's gone. My head is swimming. She had a blood clot go to her brain unexpectedly. I am fortunate to have my family and partner to support me through this. I feel for her mom. No parent should have to bury their child. Hold your loved ones close. Life is not promised, every day is a gift.
item.dc:creator: c90007

item.title: Tous les Mêmes
item.dc:creator: itsoverforyoubiatches

item.title: cool..
item.dc:creator: zorki1

item.title: Doctor Puckett
item.description:
This scared little dog was found wandering the streets of Texas with no collar, no tags and no microchip After being terrified in a San Antonio shelter we would also learn that he had no owner looking for him
I've taken in 16 fosters over the last year and I love helping high anxiety and reactive dogs My dogs run 50 miles a week and it's such a good way to build confidence for a terrified dog
So Healing Hearts Rescue arranged a transport all the way to Minnesota When he got to my house he was so terrified he wouldn't even come out of his kennel for hours.
He was scared of the leash, scared of the outside, scared of noises, scared of...everything. But with each mile and each day that passed he started opening up to us
Since he didn't have a microchip we had no idea what his name was, so the rescue league let me name him Everyone - meet DrPuckett!!!
HE EVEN LOOKS LIKE A PUCKETT MAYBE I SHOULD JUST ADOPT HIM
Watching a high anxiety foster dog slowly gain confidence is one of the greatest things in my life DrPuckett ran 30 miles his first week with us and each day we grew a little closer
He went from being too scared to be in the room with me to demanding cuddles 24/7 pretty quickly
The rescue has a 2 week hold on every new dog so we can learn all about them and get all the medical testing and preventative work done After 14 days together DrPuckett was officially up for adoption while I struggled with the option to make him a part of the family.
Some dogs have to wait YEARS to get adopted, but in the first week he was available DrPuckett got applications from all over the country People who saw our adventures on Twitter, Instagram and Facebook lined up to take him home.
I loved him, I really really loved him so much. But because he was so perfect with very little work I didn't think he was right for our family
When my 18 year old blind dog died in December I was absolutely crushed I knew then that I wanted to adopt another dog like her, a dog that desperately needed me due to extreme health or behavioral issues
So I told the rescue to process the applications The very first family that came to meet him was incredible
They had an older confident dog, they knew how to care for a dog with anxiety and they spent over 45 minutes in my house with him slowly letting him open up One hour after they left I got the email -
And DrPuckett was adopted!!! In only 20 days he went from a Texas shelter, transported to Minnesota, slowly opened up to us and found himself with an amazing home full of love
So why was I so goddamn sad. I guess having 3 dogs I knew I was never going to adopt a 4th, but since Nanna died my home just feels a little Empty.
It felt like another loss. I was emotional over DrPuckett for a week until the next high anxiety dog needed help And now that I have the next dog I realized I made the right decision - help the dogs that need me instead of filling my house with the cutest ones.
You might've seen DrPuckett all over TheFreePizzaDude posts the last month, everyone loved him We have a pretty amazing milestone coming up this weekend -
We'll be sending out the 1,000th full grocery order to an Imgurian in need!!!! Hitting this mark soon after sending the 15,000th meal is so amazing, anything to celebrate all the incredible people involved over the last 5 years Saturday, 2pm central, join us on @TheFreePizzaDude!
I'll miss this little guy for the rest of my life but it's important to focus on the positives Right now he's probably being cuddled by an entire family that loves him, and maybe every once in a while he even thinks of us. So long DrPuckett, we love you little buddy. ... If you'd like to help us send groceries to Imgurians in need Saturday but can't make the post, you can contribute to the Imgurian Meal Fund and we'll feed people in need for you! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude ... Have a beautiful week everyone, hope to see you Saturday!
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett
